internacional.title: MLB analyst weeps live on air after discovering emotional news
internacional.description: The 62-year-old spent 13 seasons as a shortstop with the White Sox and then managed the team between 2004 and 2011. He led Chicago to World Series glory in 2005.

internacional.title: 'A helpless and stupid action': Iran's ‘gates of hell’ warning amid Donald Trump's 48-hour threat
internacional.description: Echoing Trump's threat, Iran's  General Ali Abdollahi Aliabadi warned that "the simple meaning of this message is that the gates of hell will open for you". | World News

internacional.title: Jamie Laing makes awkward error on live TV during Boat Race as Cambridge win leaves host apologising
internacional.description: International Sports News: The 171st Boat Race gave fans a lot to talk about on Saturday. Cambridge beat Oxford in the men’s race, winning by 11.02 seconds on the River Thames. .
